import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if (b == 32) or (b == 9)
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
  end

  mut prefix: List<Int> = []
  mut sum = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < len
    let x = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + x
    prefix = list.push(prefix, sum)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  let plen = prefix.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < plen
    let x = match prefix.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      output = "#{x}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{x}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
